backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Service, ServiceCategory, Address) and backend logic for a home-service marketplace, including role-based access control, user approval flows, and CRUD operations for users, services, and categories.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the admin role/authentication guard was removed from AdminPanel.tsx so the /admin route is accessible to any user without role checks or redirects.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of key frontend files, describing the purpose and recent changes of hooks, admin components, and app-level routing files.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing app mode (customer/technician/admin) and rendering the appropriate sub-app; CustomerApp handles the full booking flow, authentication state, and provides an onSwitchToAdmin callback for navigating to the admin panel.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminDashb: Admin dashboard component displaying KPI cards (bookings, revenue, technicians) and a recent bookings table with static mock data and color-coded status badges.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSideb: Admin sidebar navigation component with links to all admin sections (Dashboard, Users, Technicians, Bookings, Services, Offers, Reports) and a logout button that clears the Internet Identity session.
frontend/src/components/admin/BookingsMa: Admin panel component for viewing and managing bookings with filtering by status, date, and search. Supports assigning technicians and transitioning booking statuses through valid state flows using mock data.
frontend/src/components/admin/ReportsScr: Admin reports screen with tabs for revenue analytics and technician performance, displaying bar charts of daily/monthly revenue and a sortable technician performance table using mock data.
frontend/src/components/admin/ServicesMa: Admin component for managing service categories and individual services, supporting create/edit/delete operations via React Query hooks with a modal form and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/admin/Technician: Admin component for managing technicians using mock data, allowing adding new technicians, approving documents, and toggling active/suspended status.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersManag: Admin component that lists users fetched via the useListApprovals hook, with search, pagination, and the ability to block or unblock users by updating their approval status.
frontend/src/components/customer/Account: Displays the customer account page with user profile info (name, phone, email), a menu of account options (addresses, notifications, security, help), and an admin panel shortcut for admin users, plus a logout button.
frontend/src/components/customer/AddAddr: A modal dialog form that allows users to add a new saved address with fields for label, phone, address lines, city, state, zip, and a default flag, submitting via the useSaveAddress mutation.
frontend/src/components/customer/Address: Renders a list of the user's saved addresses for selection during checkout, with options to add a new address, set a default, and continue with the selected address.
frontend/src/components/customer/AuthFlo: Implements a two-step authentication UI (phone entry then OTP) that ultimately triggers Internet Identity login for passwordless sign-in.
frontend/src/components/customer/Booking: Shows a booking review screen with cart items, address, date/time, payment method selection, and a confirm button; after confirmation it displays a success screen with the booking ID.
Provides a textarea input step in the booking flow for users to enter special instructions for the technician, with a character count and a continue button.
Displays a customer's bookings list with status filter tabs and mock booking data. Supports drilling into a booking detail view and shows status badges with color coding.
frontend/src/components/customer/BottomN: Fixed bottom navigation bar for the customer app with four tabs: Home, Bookings, Rewards, and Account. Highlights the active tab with primary color styling.
frontend/src/components/customer/CartSum: Renders the customer's shopping cart with item quantity controls, remove buttons, and a total summary. Provides back navigation and a proceed-to-checkout action.
frontend/src/components/customer/DateTim: UI component for selecting a service appointment date (next 7 days) and time slot from a predefined list. Emits selections via callbacks and includes back/continue navigation.
frontend/src/components/customer/HomeScr: Main customer home screen showing a rotating promo banner, service category grid, and featured services fetched from the backend. Supports search filtering and navigates to category or service detail views.
frontend/src/components/customer/Profile: Modal dialog that collects a new customer's first name, last name, phone, and email to create their profile on first login. Submits the profile via a mutation hook and shows success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/customer/Rewards: Displays a customer's wallet balance, referral code (with copy-to-clipboard), referral stats, and mock transaction history. Uses mock data for transactions and referral counts.
frontend/src/components/customer/Service: Shows detailed information for a single service including image, price, duration, description, and an add-to-cart button, with loading skeleton and unavailable states.
Lists all services within a selected category, rendering service cards with image, rating, duration, price, and add-to-cart functionality, plus loading skeletons and empty state.
frontend/src/components/layouts/AdminLay: Wraps admin pages with a sidebar and scrollable main content area, passing active section state and change handler to AdminSidebar.
frontend/src/components/layouts/MobileCo: Provides a centered, max-width mobile shell container with full viewport height for wrapping mobile app views.
frontend/src/components/shared/Notificat: Renders a bell icon with unread badge that opens a dropdown listing app notifications with type-specific icons, timestamps, and mark-as-read functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBookingFlow.ts: Manages the full booking flow state (cart items, address, date, time slot, payment method, notes) with callbacks for adding/removing/updating cart items and resetting the flow.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Custom hook that fetches and manages app notifications using React Query, with mock data and mutations for marking individual or all notifications as read.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, addresses, service categories, and admin operations via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports the Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme colors, status indicators, and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that renders section-specific management components (dashboard, users, technicians, bookings, services, offers, reports) based on active navigation state within an AdminLayout.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicianApp.tsx: Mobile-oriented technician app page that displays assigned jobs, allows status updates and extra item additions, and shows earnings/profile tabs with mock job data.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors using OKLCH, border radii, shadows, fonts, keyframes) and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a multi-panel home service marketplace app (customer, technician, admin) built on Firebase, tracking implemented features, architectural notes, and known issues.
